name: Evangel Iheuwkumere
degree: BSc Software Engineering, First Class honours
about: Software engineer at Marchex, building the data visualisation and self-serve analytics tools that enterprise sales and marketing teams use to understand millions of call conversations.

Graduated with First Class honours in Software Engineering from the University of Portsmouth. Previously shipped AI chatbot systems at Eli Lilly credited with over $4M in support savings. Co-founded Kevvlar, a SaaS platform still live after five years with ~150 users.

I pick up unfamiliar codebases fast and ship within the first sprint. I work well in teams with regular delivery cycles and I take ownership of problems from domain understanding through to production.

products.name: Street Keeper
products.description: Final-year project: a Strava-integrated app that turns running into a street-coverage game. GPS matched to OpenStreetMap streets with maps, milestones, and route suggestions. Deployed live.

products.name: Kevvlar
products.description: All-in-one project management SaaS: meetings, live chat, file sharing, and kanban boards on one project board. Access is tied to the project, so adding or removing a member updates every feature at once. ~150 users, live since 2021.

products.name: Gloomhunt
products.description: Browser-based 2D top-down survival shooter with a custom-built game engine. Players can enter paid prize challenges; the server checks every winning score before payout so results stay fair.
